title: Homeland Security
description: This page lists a directory of DHS public-facing websites/digital services, excluding redirect and internal use only sites.
text:
DHS.gov
The official website of the US Department of Homeland Security, providing updates on national security, emergency preparedness, immigration, cybersecurity, and disaster response to protect the nation.
Headquarters (DHS HQ) | Homeland Security Enterprise
CISA.gov
CISA.gov is the official website of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency, offering resources on cybersecurity, infrastructure protection, emergency communications, and risk management.
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) | Cybersecurity
FEMA.gov
The official website of the Federal Emergency Management Agency, providing disaster preparedness tips, emergency response resources, recovery assistance, and updates on national relief efforts.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
FLETC.gov
Official site for the Federal Law Enforcement Training Centers, with resources for law enforcement officers to enhance skills, improve public safety, and support national security.
Federal Law Enforcement Training Center (FLETC) | Law Enforcement Partnerships
TSA.gov
TSA.gov is the site for the Transportation Security Administration, offering travel tips, security screening info, TSA PreCheck® info, prohibited items lists, and real-time airport security updates.
Transportation Security Administration (TSA) | Transportation Security
USCIS.gov
USCIS.gov offers resources on immigration programs, including policies and operational information, as well as calculators and look up tools for applicants, petitioners, attorneys and others.
U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) | Citizenship and Immigration Services
USCG.mil
USCG.mil is the official website of the United States Coast Guard, offering information on missions, operations, news, careers, and maritime safety and security services.
U.S. Coast Guard (USCG) | Transportation Security, Preventing Terrorism and Targeted Violence
CBP.gov
CBP.gov is the official website of U.S. Customs and Border Protection, providing information on border security, trade, travel, customs regulations, trusted traveler programs, and enforcement news.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security
ICE.gov
Official site for US Immigrations and Customs Enforcement, offering information on immigration enforcement, homeland security investigations, detention, removal operations, and public safety resources
U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) | Immigration and Customs Enforcement
SecretService.gov
Official website of the U.S. Secret Service, providing information on its missions of protecting national leaders, safeguarding financial systems, and investigating financial crimes.
United States Secret Service (USSS) | Homeland Security Enterprise
Get.gov
.Gov is the top-level domain for government entities in the United States and Get.gov is the domain registrar for the U.S. government.
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) | Homeland Security Enterprise
niccs.CISA.gov
Official site for the National Initiative for Cybersecurity Careers and Studies - offering resources, training, and tools to help individuals pursue cybersecurity careers and enhance skills.
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) | Cybersecurity
SchoolSafety.gov
Official site for resources on improving school safety - offering guidance, tools, and best practices for educators, parents, and communities to prevent violence and promote safety.
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) | Preventing Terrorism and Targeted Violence
apps.USFA.FEMA.gov
Official site for US Fire Administration mobile apps, providing tools and resources for fire departments, emergency responders, and the public to enhance fire safety and emergency response efforts.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
DisasterAssistance.gov
DisasterAssistance.gov is the official portal for federal disaster relief, helping individuals and businesses apply for aid, check application status, and access resources after declared disasters.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
FloodSmart.gov
FloodSmart.gov is the site for the National Flood Insurance Program, offering resources on flood risks, insurance options, and tools to help individuals and communities protect against flood damage.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
hazards.FEMA.gov
Official site for FEMA’s hazard mapping and risk analysis tools, providing data on natural hazards, flood risks, and disaster preparedness to help communities reduce risk and plan for emergencies.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
msc.FEMA.gov
MSC.FEMA.gov is the site for FEMA’s Mapping and Insurance Services, offering flood hazard mapping tools, insurance resources, and risk data to help communities manage and reduce disaster risks.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
Ready.gov
Ready.gov is the official FEMA website for resources and guidance on emergency preparedness, helping individuals, families, and communities plan, prepare, and respond to disasters.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
training.FEMA.gov
Official site for FEMA’s National Disaster & Emergency Management University. It provides independent study, virtual, and in-person training information related to all aspects of emergency management.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
USFA.FEMA.gov
Official site for the U.S. Fire Administration, providing resources and training to support fire prevention, safety, and emergency response efforts for firefighters and emergency responders.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
FLETA.gov
Official site for the Federal Law Enforcement Training Accreditation Board, with information on the process to meet federal standards, reports, current accreditations, and access to the standards.
Federal Law Enforcement Training Accreditation (FLETA) | Law Enforcement Partnerships
OHSS.DHS.gov
Official website for the DHS Office of Homeland Security Statistics, providing data and reports on immigration, law enforcement, emergency management, maritime, and international trade.
Headquarters (DHS HQ) | Homeland Security Enterprise
OIG.DHS.gov
Official site for DHS’s Office of Inspector General, providing reports, audits, investigations, and oversight to ensure accountability, transparency, and effectiveness in DHS operations.
Office of Inspector General (OIG) | Homeland Security Enterprise
tsaenrollmentbyidemia.TSA.DHS.gov
Official TSA PreCheck® enrollment site - travelers can apply, renew, manage appointments, and access information to expedite security screening at U.S. airports; also supporting TWIC, HME, and FTSP.
Transportation Security Administration (TSA) | Transportation Security
eGov.USCIS.gov
Egov.USCIS.gov is a suite of online services for the public to check immigration case status, case history, processing times, and access other essential immigration application services.
U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) | Citizenship and Immigration Services
E-Verify.gov
E-Verify.gov is the informational website for the E-Verify program, providing information about the E-Verify program and directing employees and employers to helpful tools.
U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) | Homeland Security Enterprise
my.USCIS.gov
my.USCIS.gov is a collection of services allowing applicants and representatives to submit applications, check case status, manage appointments, and access immigration resources.
U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) | Citizenship and Immigration Services
myEVerify.USCIS.gov
MyEVerify.uscis.gov allows employees and job applicants to manage their E-Verify accounts, check employment eligibility, and resolve issues with their employment authorization records.
U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) | Homeland Security Enterprise
BWT.CBP.gov
Official site for U.S. Customs and Border Protection’s Border Wait Times (BWT) tool, providing real-time data on wait times at U.S. ports of entry to help travelers plan their border crossings.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security
careers.cbp.gov
Explore career opportunities with U.S. Customs and Border Protection. Join a team dedicated to safeguarding America's borders and ensuring national security. Discover roles, benefits and how to apply.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security, Homeland Security Careers / Employee Resources
DTOPS.CBP.DHS.gov
Official site for CBP's Decal and Transponder Online Processing System, allowing travelers to purchase and manage vehicle transponders/decals for crossing U.S. land borders.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security, Transportation Security
ESTA.CBP.DHS.gov
ESTA.CBP.DHS.gov is the official site for the Electronic System for Travel Authorization (ESTA), where eligible travelers can apply for visa-free entry to the U.S. under the Visa Waiver Program.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security
EVUS.gov
EVUS.gov is the site for the Electronic Visa Update System, allowing Chinese citizens with a 10-year B1/B2, B1, or B2 visa to update their visa information before traveling to the United States.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security
help.CBP.gov
Official support site for U.S. Customs and Border Protection, providing assistance with travel, customs procedures, border security, and answers to FAQs for travelers and businesses.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security
i94.CBP.DHS.gov
Official CBP site for travelers to apply for provisional I94, access their I-94 arrival/departure record, check travel history, and retrieve essential entry and exit information.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security
rulings.CBP.gov
Customs Rulings Online Search System (CROSS) is a searchable database of CBP Customs rulings that can be retrieved based on simple or complex search characteristics.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security
TTP.DHS.gov
TTP.dhs.gov is the Trusted Traveler Programs website, where users can apply for Global Entry, TSA PreCheck®, SENTRI, NEXUS, and FAST to expedite travel through dedicated security and customs lanes.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Transportation Security, Border Security
portal.ICE.gov
Portal.ICE.gov is the official site for ICE's online services, such as accessing case information, managing requests, and interacting with immigration enforcement and investigation-related programs.
U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) | Immigration and Customs Enforcement
StudyintheStates.DHS.gov
StudyInTheStates.dhs.gov is the official site for U.S. immigration information for foreign students, offering resources on school certifications, visa requirements and applications
U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) | Immigration and Customs Enforcement
TRIPWire.DHS.gov
The Technical Resource for Incident Prevention (TRIP) is DHS's secure, online, information-sharing and resource portal for security and emergency services professionals across the US.
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) | Homeland Security Enterprise
ZeroTrust.Cyber.gov
Official site for CISA's cybersecurity framework that ensures secure access to resources regardless of location by emphasizing continuous verification, least privilege access, and monitoring.
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) | Cybersecurity
agents.FloodSmart.gov
Official site for insurance agents, providing resources and tools to help them sell and manage National Flood Insurance Program policies, while offering flood risk data and insurance options.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
CDP.DHS.gov
CDP.DHS.gov is the site for the Center for Domestic Preparedness, offering resources to enhance the preparedness and response capabilities of emergency responders and public safety professionals.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
FirstResponderTraining.gov
Comprehensive resource for training programs and courses for first responders and federally-funded training partners.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
FloodMaps.FEMA.gov
Official site for FEMA’s flood hazard mapping, providing access to flood maps, flood zone determinations, and risk data to help manage flood risks and make informed decisions.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
GO.FEMA.gov
FEMA Grants Outcomes (FEMA GO) is the grants management system that supports FEMA grants programs. The system allows users to apply, track and manage all disaster and non-disaster grants.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
lscms.FEMA.gov
FEMA's secure portal for managing and tracking disaster logistics. It ensures efficient supply chain operations by providing real-time data on inventory, shipments, and resource allocation.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
NFIPDirect.FEMA.gov
Secure portal for managing National Flood Insurance Program policies. It enables agents and policyholders to access policy information, submit claims, and make payments.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
NFIPServices.FloodSmart.gov
Official site for managing National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP) policies, providing access to flood insurance information, claims, and coverage options.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
NFIRS.FEMA.gov
The NFIRS application is a public facing website that fire service users at the state, local, tribal, and territorial levels use to report the details with their emergency responses.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
PrepToolkit.FEMA.gov
FEMA official site/online portal that provides the whole community with tools and resources to aid in implementing the components the National Preparedness System.
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) | Disasters & Resilience
sass.FLETC.DHS.gov
Official site for the FLETC Student Assignment and Scheduling System, providing a platform for managing training assignments, schedules, and course registrations for law enforcement professionals.
Federal Law Enforcement Training Center (FLETC) | Law Enforcement Partnerships
APFS-Cloud.DHS.gov
APFS-Cloud.DHS.gov is the site for the Acquisition Planning Forecast System, providing a portal for businesses, particularly small businesses, to view anticipated contract actions over $250,000.
Headquarters (DHS HQ) | Do Business with DHS
go.DHS.gov
go.dhs.gov is the official link shortener and QR code application for the U.S. Department of Homeland Security.
Headquarters (DHS HQ) | Homeland Security Enterprise
Juntos.gov
Spanish website for the Family Reunification Task Force, created to identify, support and reunite families who were separated by the U.S. government between January 20, 2017 and January 20, 2021.
Headquarters (DHS HQ) | Border Security
myOIDO.DHS.gov
Portal for external public users to submit a request for assistance assistance with a concern related to conditions or an incident that occurred while in immigration detention.
Headquarters (DHS HQ) | Immigration and Customs Enforcement
NIEM.gov
Official site for the National Information Exchange Model (NIEM), a framework for sharing information across federal, state, and local agencies.
Headquarters (DHS HQ) | Homeland Security Enterprise
release.NIEM.gov
Official portal for accessing the National Information Exchange Model (NIEM) releases, providing resources for implementing and managing data exchange standards.
Headquarters (DHS HQ) | Homeland Security Enterprise
Together.gov
Site for the Family Reunification Task Force, built to identify, support and reunite families who were separated by the United States (U.S.) government between January 20, 2017 and January 20, 2021.
Headquarters (DHS HQ) | Border Security
tools.NIEM.gov
Comprehensive portal offering tools and resources for implementing the National Information Exchange Model, providing access to schemas, documentation, and implementation guides.
Headquarters (DHS HQ) | Homeland Security Enterprise
Hotline.OIG.DHS.gov
Secure portal for reporting fraud, waste, abuse, and misconduct within the Department of Homeland Security to the DHS Office of the Inspector General.
Office of Inspector General (OIG) | Homeland Security Enterprise
SAFETYAct.gov
Official site for the SAFETY Act program, offering resources and information on certifying and accrediting security technologies and practices to protect against terrorist threats.
Science and Technology (S&T) | Science and Technology, Preventing Terrorism and Targeted Violence
EXIS.TSA.DHS.gov
TSA'​s Exercise Information System (EXIS®) assists security planners, build and manage exercise planning teams, and share best practices & lessons learned. Users can design and document exercises.
Transportation Security Administration (TSA) | Transportation Security
TRIP.DHS.gov
TRIP website provides travelers a streamlined process for requesting assistance and resolving travel-related issues. Concerns are reviewed and adjudicated by DHS HQ, TSA, CBP, DoS, and FBI.
Transportation Security Administration (TSA) | Transportation Security
immvets.DHS.gov
immvets.DHS.gov lets military members, veterans, and their families to register for resources from Homeland Security (DHS), Veterans Affairs (VA), and the Department of Defense (DoD).
U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) | Citizenship and Immigration Services
SAVE.USCIS.gov
Systematic Alien Verification for Entitlements (SAVE) is an online service that provides government agencies with accurate information on the immigration status of benefit applicants.
U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) | Homeland Security Enterprise
developer.NVMC.USCG.gov
Official site for developers working with the U.S. Coast Guard's National Vessel Movement Center, providing resources and tools for integrating vessel movement data and improving maritime compliance.
U.S. Coast Guard (USCG) | Transportation Security
dhssans.NVMC.USCG.gov
Official site for the U.S. Coast Guard’s Satellite Automated Notification System, providing maritime industry stakeholders with important safety and security alerts.
U.S. Coast Guard (USCG) | Transportation Security
enoad.NVMC.USCG.gov
Official site for the USCG's Electronic Notice of Arrival and Departure system, allowing vessel operators to electronically submit arrival and departure information to comply with U.S. regulations.
U.S. Coast Guard (USCG) | Transportation Security
NavCen.USCG.gov
Official site for the USCG Navigation Center, providing real-time information on GPS, Broadcast Notices to Mariners, and resources to support safe and efficient navigation.
U.S. Coast Guard (USCG) | Transportation Security
awt.CBP.gov
Airport Wait Times (AWT) is a tracking system for collecting and reporting passenger wait times at select participating domestic airports with active wait time collection systems.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security
cbpcomplaints.CBP.gov
Official site for filing complaints, compliments, tips, and feedback regarding CBP services and employees, allowing travelers, importers and the general public to report issues and seek resolution.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security
e.CBP.DHS.gov
Site for U.S. Customs and Border Protection’s electronic services, providing tools for managing trade, traveler information, and customs procedures, ensuring compliance with US border regulations.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security
eAllegations.CBP.gov
EAllegations.CBP.gov is the site for submitting allegations of customs violations, providing a secure way to report suspicious activities related to US trade, customs, and border security.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security
IPRR.CBP.gov
Official site for CBP’s e-Recordation Program, allowing intellectual property right owners to partner with CBP to receive border enforcement on their registered trademarks and copyrights.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security
IPRS.CBP.gov
Official database system for CBP's e-Recordation Program, containing public versions of CBP intellectual property rights recordations.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security
rsp.CBP.gov
Allows vetted private sector stakeholders (e.g. airlines, shipping) to request additional overtime inspection services beyond what CBP could otherwise provide, accommodating increased customs demand.
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) | Border Security
eServiceRegistration.ICE.gov
The official site for ICE eService Registration, allowing registration for an ICE vetted account for representing attorneys or aliens to securely electronically serve documents for immigration cases.
U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) | Immigration and Customs Enforcement
IPRCenter.gov
The National Intellectual Property Rights Coordination Center (NIPRCC) is a U.S. government center that coordinates the U.S. government's enforcement of intellectual property laws.
U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) | Economic Security, Immigration and Customs Enforcement
locator.ICE.gov
ICE detainee locator system, providing the public with a tool to search for individuals in ICE custody and obtain their location and status information.
U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) | Immigration and Customs Enforcement
VINELink.DHS.gov
Official site for VINE, providing victims of crime with access to information about offenders' custody status and notifications of important updates through a secure online platform.
U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) | Immigration and Customs Enforcement
